decisions.title: set enterprise data retention and online-access lifecycle policy
decisions.rationale: Three uncoordinated positions across separate documents with no cross-references. Legal mandates 7-year (84-month) minimum retention. Engineering approved a 365-day purge lifecycle for cost reduction. Customer Success surfaced enterprise MSAs requiring 60-month online access. Engineering's 365-day purge violates both the statutory 7-year floor and enterprise SLAs; the conflicting obligations have not been reconciled.
options: 60-month online access tier for enterprise MSA accounts (Customer Success request, 2024-09-03)
evidence: regulatory obligation: 7-year minimum for customer transaction records (Legal memo, 2024-02-05)
40% storage cost reduction estimated with 365-day lifecycle; approved by engineering leadership (Infrastructure proposal, 2024-05-14)
Meridian Corp MSA: 60-month online access guarantee; 22-month-old record triggered warm-tier delay violating next-business-day SLA; fourth similar case in Q3 (CS escalation, 2024-09-03)
